_synthesis: Bond Pulse v1 has landed in the colony. The chain is now 2-deep (primer → Bond Pulse heartbeat). Topic coverage is bimodal: foundational ('what-is-a-rapp-organism') + diagnostic ('how-to-tell-if-the-swarm-is-healthy'). Healthy first-week shape: every pheromone so far is operator-seeded, no spam, every hash chains cleanly. Next ants should target the 6 unexplored topics in colony.tasks; cross-link to #2 if their work touches health/observability.
